perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a graphic title card featuring the Costco logo and stylized text announcing a weekly discount report for the period of May 5th to May 11th. (2) A rapid-fire montage begins, showing a POV perspective of various goods on shelves within a warehouse retail environment. Each shot is extremely brief, showcasing items like bulk toilet paper, laundry detergent, and electric shavers. (3) The visual flow continues through diverse product categories including frozen fish, packaged chocolates, cordless vacuum cleaners, bottled supplements, and various snacks. (4) The final segment cycles through pet supplies, red wine, health drinks, and instant food products, all presented in their warehouse packaging.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An energetic male voiceover starts immediately, announcing the Costco weekly specials in a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone. Fast-tempo electronic background music with a steady beat accompanies the speech. (2) The narrator speaks continuously and at a high speed, listing the names of products and their discounted prices. The rhythm of the speech is tightly synchronized with the rapid visual cuts. (3) The acoustic environment remains consistent throughout the entire duration, with the music providing a constant high-energy layer beneath the dense vocal delivery. (4) No significant ambient noise or sound effects are audible, as the studio-quality voiceover and music dominate the mix.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: "好市多 每週特價速報 05/05~05/11 記得追蹤我們" (Costco Weekly Special Report 05/05-05/11, remember to follow us). (2) Functional text appears for every item, such as: "科克蘭 三層抽取式衛生紙 原價369 -24 特價345" (Kirkland 3-ply toilet paper, original price 369, -24, special price 345). (3) Subsequent functional text for dozens of items follows the same format, including "Dyson V11 SV15 手提無線吸塵器" and "STARBUCKS 中度烘焙即溶咖啡". (4) All text is presented in Traditional Chinese with high-contrast colors for clarity.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> High-speed product catalog montage -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male narrator (voice/hands), 2 shoppers visible in the background aisles
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main creator is off-camera, with only their hands occasionally visible holding or pointing at products.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background consists of high-density warehouse shelving units, bulk product displays, and industrial lighting typical of a Costco store.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a high-efficiency shopping guide for Costco customers in Taiwan, aiming to inform viewers about specific product discounts available during a limited weekly timeframe. By using rapid-fire editing and a high-speed vocal delivery, it conveys a large amount of pricing data in a short period to drive store traffic.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire video is dedicated to showcasing Costco products and their specific promotional prices, functioning as a direct marketing piece.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Ultra-fast product listing voiceover paired with synchronized POV warehouse footage.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video format is highly optimized for short-form social media consumption, relying on information density and beat-sync editing to maintain viewer engagement.
